generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance StepperMotorCartController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for the cart stepper motor enabling precise lateral movement of the gantry crane. Interfaces with Arduino for real-time command execution and position feedback."
]

instance StepperMotorHoistController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for the hoist stepper motor responsible for vertical movement and load positioning. Communicates with Arduino to execute motion commands and receive encoder feedback."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic gripper at the end of the hoist used for gripping and releasing puck containers. Controlled via Arduino with no specified remote interface or safety constraints beyond Continuous Validation thresholds."
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded Arduino microcontroller interfacing with all sensors and actuators. Collects data from SwingAngleEncoder and Anemometer, transmits sensor data to Digital Twin, and executes commands for StepperMotorCartController, StepperMotorHoistController, and CraneElectromagnet."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist to provide feedback on lateral deviations. Interfaced with Arduino for data transmission to the Digital Twin system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed to influence trajectory adjustments of the crane. Data transmitted via Arduino to the Digital Twin system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneOperationalStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance CraneMotionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneElectromagnet
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model representing the crane's kinematic behavior derived from Fusion 360 CAD simulations. Used for trajectory planning and motion prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance CraneDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model simulating the crane's physical behavior including motion dynamics and load distribution. Used for predicting system responses under varying conditions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance SwingAngleDataDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database records of swing angle measurements from the SwingAngleEncoder. Stored in TimescaleDB for real-time and historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

instance WindSpeedDataDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database records of wind speed measurements from the Anemometer. Stored in TimescaleDB for trajectory adjustment calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneOperationalStateDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive time-series data capturing the crane's operational state including position, velocity, load status, and sensor measurements. Stored in TimescaleDB for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneOperationalStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Optimized movement trajectories for the crane's cart and hoist generated by the Trajectory Generator Service. Used for real-time control and validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneMotionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Python library implementing kinematic simulations, trajectory planning, and control logic for the gantry crane. Integrates with Arduino via serial communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database optimized for storing high-frequency sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, motor currents) with sub-second latency. Facilitates real-time and historical data analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating bidirectional data streaming between Arduino and Digital Twin services. Enables lightweight publish-subscribe communication with configurable QoS levels."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplication
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker-based containerization of Digital Twin services (e.g., MQTT broker, Grafana) enabling portable deployment and modular architecture."
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboard
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard for real-time and historical visualization of crane metrics (e.g., swing angle, electromagnet duty cycle) using TimescaleDB plugins."
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Behavioral model generating optimized movement trajectories for the crane's cart and hoist, leveraging kinematic and dynamic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneTrajectoryData
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analytical model simulating the crane's physical behavior (e.g., motion dynamics, load distribution) to predict system responses under varying conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validation mechanism comparing real-time sensor measurements (e.g., position, swing angle) against simulated trajectories using distance metrics and validating against predefined thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Closed-loop control optimization and real-time trajectory planning implementing kinematic models to compute optimal actuator commands for crane motion."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series data archival and event logging of sensor data (e.g., joint angles, velocities, loads) and control signals with timestamped records."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalHistoryInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization and real-time dashboards rendering CAD models with streamed sensor data to visualize physical state and kinematic trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationDashboardInsight
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python-based service continuously capturing and forwarding the crane's state data to TimescaleDB database via MQTT broker."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationalStateDB
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized movement trajectories for crane cart and hoist based on kinematic and dynamic constraints, enabling efficient operation."
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted system responses under varying conditions including motion dynamics and load distribution for operational planning."
]

instance DynamicBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights into the crane's dynamic behavior including motion stability and load handling characteristics."
]

instance FidelityMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative metrics assessing the accuracy and reliability of the Digital Twin's predictions compared to physical sensor readings."
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts triggered when model-to-reality discrepancies exceed predefined thresholds, enabling corrective actions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters and strategies for crane motion based on real-time sensor feedback and predictive models."
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to control algorithms (e.g., PID tuning) to mitigate errors or disturbances in real-time operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational data including sensor readings, control signals, and event logs for post-mortem analysis and maintenance planning."
]

instance VisualizationDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visual representations of crane state including real-time trajectories, error metrics, and control outputs for monitoring and training."
]

// C1: Environment
instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Closed-loop control environment for the lab-scale gantry crane system enabling bidirectional data exchange between physical and digital components."
    base:contains PhysicalGantryCrane, DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance PhysicalGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Mechanical gantry crane with kinematic joints and load-bearing structure interfaced with embedded controllers for real-time operation."
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, StepperMotorCartController, StepperMotorHoistController, CraneElectromagnet, ArduinoController
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital representation of the lab-scale gantry crane including computational models, services, and visualization tools for real-time monitoring and control."
    base:contains CraneKinematicModel, CraneDynamicModel, TimescaleDB, PythonGantryLib, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, LoggingApplication
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is orchestrated through a **Trajectory Generator Service**, which uses a **kinematics model** to compute optimal movement trajectories for the crane. These trajectories are sent to the **Control Application**, a Python-based controller that interfaces with the **Physical Crane Interface** to execute commands.

**Control Flows:**
- **Command Types:** Optimized trajectories (e.g., Cartesian coordinates, velocity profiles) with no residual swinging motion at endpoints.
- **Control Message Formats:** Not explicitly detailed; assumed to be structured data (e.g., JSON or binary payloads) transmitted via the Python interface.
- **Validation and Authentication:** Not mentioned; implicit reliance on system permissions (e.g., role-based access control) is speculative.
- **Feedback Systems:** The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories (from physical sensors) with simulated trajectories (from the Simulation Service) using distance metrics. If thresholds are breached, alerts are triggered via the **Dashboard**.
- **Conflict Resolution:** Not detailed; assumed to follow priority-based scheduling for critical operations (e.g., emergency stops).
- **Command Execution Confirmation:** Not specified; feedback is inferred from the validation service’s comparison results.

**Constraints:** The document does not describe retry mechanisms, command timeouts, or hierarchical control hierarchies.
"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems described exhibit bidirectional interaction between physical and digital components, enabling real-time status monitoring and continuous logging of operational data. In the **GreenhouseDT** exemplar, the digital twin synchronizes with the physical greenhouse via a message broker (ActiveMQ) and a time-series database (InfluxDB), though specific synchronization frequencies or latency requirements are not explicitly documented. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar leverages a Raspberry Pi with sensors for real-time data acquisition, interfacing with an AutomationML-based digital twin pipeline hosted on **Microsoft Azure**, implying low-latency requirements for simulation and prediction services. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not provide explicit temporal details, but its architecture (described via the C4 Model) suggests real-time control and monitoring for container logistics operations. Overall, temporal granularity is implied to be fine-grained for adaptive decision-making, but precise frequencies (e.g., Hz, ms) or latency thresholds are not specified in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the documents exhibit **ad-hoc orchestration patterns** rather than relying on commercial frameworks. **GreenhouseDT** uses a **modular architecture** with **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, and **virtual machines (VMs)** for deployment, enabling **event-driven synchronization** between physical and digital components. The system leverages **containerization** (implied via VMs) for scalability and reproducibility. **Air Quality Management** employs **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, integrates with **Raspberry Pi sensors** for real-time data acquisition, and utilizes **Microsoft Azure tools** for pipeline orchestration, including runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction services. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model**, suggesting a **containerized or modular software architecture** with clear separation of concerns, though specific orchestration details (e.g., microservices, event buses) are not provided. Coordination mechanisms are **implicitly handled via message brokers (e.g., ActiveMQ)** or cloud-based orchestration (Azure) but lack explicit mention of advanced patterns like federated learning or dynamic reconfiguration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system ensures model fidelity and validity through the **Continuous Validation Service**, which continuously compares real-time sensor measurements of executed trajectories with simulated trajectories. It calculates **distance metrics** between the two and compares the result against an **acceptable threshold**. If the threshold is breached, **operators are notified via the dashboard** to take corrective action. The system does not implement automatic emergency braking, trajectory recalculation, or specify uncertainty sources (e.g., sensor noise, dynamic friction) beyond the threshold-based validation mechanism."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The digital twin system employs a **centralized MQTT Broker** for inter-service communication, enabling asynchronous messaging between containers (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**). The **Physical Crane Interface** connects to the crane controllers via unspecified industrial protocols (not detailed). No explicit network topology, bandwidth/latency requirements, or security protocols (e.g., TLS, encryption) are mentioned. The **MQTT Broker** facilitates signaling but lacks details on redundancy or reliability mechanisms. Physical-to-virtual data transmission relies on the **Logging Application** and **Database**, while virtual-to-physical control flows depend on the **Control Application** and **Physical Crane Interface**. No explicit mention of physical protocols (e.g., Modbus, CAN) or network architecture (e.g., star topology) is provided.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s Hosting and Deployment** is implemented on a **single on-premise personal computer**, with all software components (e.g., Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard) containerized using **Docker**. The **TimescaleDB** database stores all system data, while the **Grafana Dashboard** visualizes it.

**Deployment Infrastructure:**
- **Hosting Platform:** On-premise (local PC); no cloud/edge deployment mentioned.
- **Computational/Storage Requirements:** Not quantified; assumed to be modest (e.g., single-core CPU, limited RAM) given the lab-scale setup.
- **Scalability Mechanisms:** Not supported; deployment is monolithic (all containers run on one machine).
- **Deployment Models:** Docker containers; no mention of orchestration tools (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker Swarm).
- **Availability/Redundancy:** Not detailed; no failover or high-availability configurations described.

**Constraints:** The document does not specify backup strategies, resource monitoring, or auto-scaling policies.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems demonstrate **limited but specific integration** with external systems, primarily centered around data exchange and operational tooling. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for logging and **ActiveMQ** (JMS-based message broker) for asynchronous communication, enabling real-time data flow between the physical greenhouse and digital twin. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar relies on **Microsoft Azure** for cloud-based simulation and prediction services, though explicit dependencies on external enterprise systems (e.g., ERP or MES) are not documented. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not detail external integrations beyond the C4 Model’s depiction of **Operator** and **Researcher** stakeholders, implying minimal third-party dependencies. No standardized interoperability protocols (e.g., OPC UA, IIoT protocols) or explicit Digital Twin federation mechanisms are mentioned. AutomationML is referenced in the Air Quality Management exemplar as a **digital twin representation format**, but its role in horizontal integration (e.g., cross-system interoperability) is not elaborated."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "
The provided exemplars exhibit **limited adherence to industry standards**:
- **GreenhouseDT** and **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** do not reference any formal standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010, OMG Digital Twin Reference Model) or certification frameworks. Their development follows **ad-hoc methodologies** with no mention of compliance requirements.
- **Air Quality Management** uses **AutomationML** (a standardized modeling language for automation systems) but does not specify compliance with **ISO 15926-3** or other interoperability frameworks. The **ActiveMQ message broker** is mentioned without explicit reference to **JMS (Java Message Service) compliance**, though it is a JMS-compliant implementation by default. Microsoft Azure tools are employed for cloud integration but lack explicit standardization details beyond vendor-specific APIs.

No exemplars describe **interoperability standards** (e.g., OPC UA, ROS 2) or **certification processes** (e.g., IEC 62443 for cybersecurity). The **C4 Model** is used for architectural documentation but is not a standardization framework itself."
]
